etymology.description: Depicts 𠂹 (hanging element) + 土 (earth) = flowers hanging from a plant
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠂹 is an ancient form of 垂(垂) (chuí, "hang down") and depicts the image of flowers hanging from a plant. This visualization is directly related to the idea of something drooping or hanging downward, typically from the earth or ground as part of a plant. The incorporation of 土(土) (tǔ, "earth") suggests the grounding context of the flowers.
